body:
This PR reorganizes `TimeSteppers` and `Models` to make room for a new model type, `ShallowWaterModel`.

Physics-specific functions that were previously in `TimeSteppers` are now in `Models`. This is a positive change: pressure correction functions and tendency terms that are intrinsic to incompressible fluid dynamics are now located in the submodule `Oceananigans.Models.IncompressibleModels`.

Resolves #1165 .
title: Makes room for ShallowWaterModels
